title: How The Rhinoceros Got His Skin
content:
This Uninhabited Island
Is near Cape Gardafui;
But it's hot, too hot, of Suez
For the likes of you and me
Ever to go in a P. & O.
To call on the Cake Parsee.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Rudyard Kipling delivers a powerful performance in "How The Rhinoceros Got His Skin"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
